message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber 0

participant "ElementModel" as ElementModel
participant "CardModel" as CardModel
participant "StringCard" as StringCard
participant "Publish" as Publish
participant "ElementView" as ElementView
participant "DeckView" as DeckView
participant "IOTech" as IOTech
participant "DeckTechView" as DeckTechView

activate ElementModel
note left of ElementModel: encode
activate CardModel
note right of CardModel: encode each CardModel
create StringCard
deactivate StringCard
return StringCardCollection
deactivate CardModel
deactivate ElementModel

activate ElementModel
note left of ElementModel: send
activate Publish
note right of Publish: send StringCardCollection
activate ElementView
note right of ElementView: Store StringCardCollection
deactivate ElementView
deactivate Publish
deactivate ElementModel

note left of ElementView: Show
activate DeckView
note right of DeckView: GetDeckView
activate IOTech
note right of IOTech: create
create DeckTechView
deactivate DeckTechView
return
Show(StringCardCollection)
deactivate IOTech
deactivate DeckView

@enduml
```
